refs.description: Java stream-summary library with a well-documented CountMinSketch implementation (src/main/java/com/clearspring/analytics/stream/frequency/CountMinSketch.java).
Spark uses Count-Min Sketch internally and exposes DataFrame.stat.countMinSketch for approximate frequency estimation.
Twitter's Algebird provides a monoid-based Count-Min Sketch used in Scalding/Summingbird production aggregation pipelines.
